description:
Nightly job that catches any drift between Stripe and MDI subscription state. Webhooks should keep them in sync, but this is the safety net.

**Scope**
- `workers/src/jobs/reconcile-stripe-mdi.ts` — runs every 6h (more frequently than case reconciliation since billing drift has real money impact).
- Joins `subscriptions` table on (`stripe_subscription_id`, `mdi_subscription_id`).
- For each row: re-fetch from Stripe and MDI, compare status / current_period_end / payment_method_status.
- Drift cases handled:
  - Stripe active + MDI cancelled → cancel Stripe at period end + alarm.
  - Stripe cancelled + MDI active → cancel MDI immediately + alarm.
  - Stripe past_due + MDI active → pause MDI (dunning, T-027) if not already.
  - Unpaired rows (one ID present, the other null) older than 1h → alarm for ops review.
- Datadog metrics: `subscription.drift_count`, `subscription.unpaired_count`.
- Alarm policy: any drift_count >0 pages on-call.

**Acceptance**
- Manually drift a sandbox subscription (e.g., cancel only in Stripe) → next run corrects MDI side + writes audit + alarms.
- Unpaired row detection fires within 1h of creation.
title: Stripe ↔ MDI subscription reconciliation job
